title: Doflamingo's Rule Is Exposed
description: Pages 22–22 focus on doflamingo's rule is exposed, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #6 as the country erupts after Sugar's spell breaks, the underground victims return, and Doflamingo's secret rule begins collapsing in public.

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: Oh, my!!! A single strike from Lucy has sunk the whole ring!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Hey!! What do you think you're doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I have some- thing to take care of now. I'm going to win this!!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: He's heading down to the under- ground right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I just heard an incredible noise from up above!! You're overdoing it again, aren't you?!

summary: Doflamingo's Rule Is Exposed develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
